summary: Tested 3 new NotaryChain features: (1) Public Certificate Verification Page, (2) Ceremony Analytics Widget in Admin Dashboard, (3) Face Capture via Webcam in Ceremony Form. All features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts chart sizing issue on initial render, but charts display correctly after data loads

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features tested and working. Certificate verification page at /verify-certificate works with URL parameter auto-verify. Admin analytics tab shows Ceremony Pipeline Analytics widget with summary cards, consensus pie chart, agent pass rates, and volume chart. Ceremony form has Upload/Cam toggle buttons for both ID Document and Selfie sections.

backend_api.GET /api/ceremony/verify/certificate/{ha: PASS - Returns verified:true with ceremony details

frontend_ui.Agent Verdicts section: PASS - Shows Verifier, Witness, Sealer cards with PASS/FAIL
frontend_ui.Blockchain Seal section: PASS - Shows network, topic ID, transaction ID, consensus hash
